title: acer negundo var. interior
intro: Acer negundo var. interior, also known as the Interior Boxelder, is a variety of the Boxelder tree (Acer negundo) native to North America. The plant has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, including anti-inflammatory and antimicrobial compounds, which are said to aid in the treatment of various health issues. The Interior Boxelder has been reported to have health benefits such as reducing fever, relieving digestive issues, and supporting immune function. Herbal preparations of the plant can be made by infusing the leaves or bark in hot water to create a tea, or by drying and grinding the plant material into a powder for later use.
